name: Switch
purpose: Toggles a persistent on or off setting with a compact control that works across native platforms and desktop web.
whenToUse: Use for immediate boolean preferences or settings that can be changed inline.
Pair with a visible Label so the setting meaning is unambiguous.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for mutually exclusive multi-choice selection; use Radio Group or Select instead.
Do not use when the action needs confirmation before it should take effect.
accessibilityRequirements: Always provide a visible label or explicit accessibility label describing what the switch controls.
Expose the checked and disabled states through accessibilityState.
